feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,015Chapters: 12/55Kudos: 76

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,229Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Touch Of Love
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,234Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 10

Summary: Merlin's eyes changed when he did magic. He knew that. In the privacy of his own head, Arthur had come to think of that golden gleam as beautiful since he'd discovered the secret of his sorcery. This was different. It crackled like lightning; a storm held in Merlin's gaze. It cast brief light upon his cheekbones, spilling odd shadows across his face.'What's happening?''He is dying,' a woman's voice said, sugar-sweet. 'And he will take you with him, Arthur Pendragon.'---A routine hunt threatens to become a fatal disaster when Arthur and Merlin are captured and imprisoned in a dungeon used during the Purge. Can they fight their way to freedom, or will Merlin's power be the death of them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,052Chapters: 14/20Kudos: 52

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dragon's Fulfilment
entry.summary:
Author: Amacerise

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,533Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Arthur, his Knights, and Merlin return from their quest to kill a hippogriff. But not without new secrets to whisper, new treasures to cherish, and a whole court to beguile into believing that Arthur and his manservant aren't married in everything but name. It's one year until Merlin gives birth to his clutch of dragonlings. What tribulations will follow in the meantime? Rating may go up, tags may change. This is primarily an exercise in discovery writing so bear with me for major pauses; hopefully it's not a mess.

entry.title: Just a Little Fun
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,810Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Merlin arrives in Camelot and meets an arrogant, infuriatingly attractive knight. Who he thinks is just some Noble's son who wants to get dicked down by a pheasant. While Merlin is happy to play along - nothing in Camelot is ever what it seems—and his simple fun is about to get so much more complicated.

entry.title: Say the word
entry.summary:
Author: a_bored_fan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,221Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 349

Summary: Arthur is the only son to Uther Pendragon, magic-hating King of Camelot.Merlin is the most powerful wizard in existence.Their friendship is not only unlikely but potentially dangerous (for Merlin).Add into the mix a centuries-old curse that affects every person throughout the kingdom, and really, everything could go completely wrong. Or: If you fall in love with someone their name appears on your forearm. Merlin and Arthur, despite having many differences and sometimes arguments, get along, maybe too much for their own good. I am back, and editing and revisiting the first chapters. You can reread the edited versions or wait till I post the newer ones, love yall.

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,497Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 24

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any.

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,970,633Chapters: 127/?Kudos: 1,631

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: so it was (well, this is mine)
entry.summary:
Author: cloudsofhoney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,296Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: Arthur continued fighting off bandits, turning around to scan through and see where he'd found himself now. His eyes focused on Merlin standing still in the field, his eyes closed and fingers curled up into a first. A bandit was running up to him with a mace. A strong surge of fear overtook Arthur, as Merlin seemed completely unaware. What the hell was he doing? Arthur wondered. Even Merlin wasn't that stupid. He muttered something under his breath. Several things happened the next moment. Or: Five times Arthur wonders what Merlin mutters under his breath and one time he learns what it was.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Like I lived my whole life before the first light
entry.summary:
Author: Once_Im_Reborn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,866Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 129

Summary: Something was wrong. Not the “the world is ending, and we’re all going to die” sort of wrong, but an odd, humming some kind of wrong that Merlin could feel threading through the halls of Camelot like an intruder. He reached out with his magic more than once, trying to taste the disturbance, but nothing tugged back. Nothing whispered danger. Nothing even shimmered suspiciously. Still…Something felt off. As if certain people were keeping very specific secrets. Important secrets. Normally, that would have been fine. Merlin had secrets too, the kind he intended to keep tucked away until the end of his days – preferably long after that, if fate allowed. But this was about Gwen. or; Where Merlin finds out about Gwens' secret, and it might change everything he and Arthur know about themselves and their feelings towards one another (along some other encounters). (I'm updating the older chapters as it doesn't quite fit my writing style anymore. But nothing about the story changed :) )

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,592Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 36

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 337,511Chapters: 72/110Kudos: 3,297

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Dissonance
entry.summary:
Author: BackToDust

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,584Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 211

Summary: Arthur survived the battle of Camlann. Long live the King. But since his return, a door in his mind and heart has been opened. The bond between him and Merlin is shifting, and so is the balance of the universe. A new prophecy begins to take shape, one that reveals the missing note of a broken song. More chapters and tags to come.

  • Protective Merlin (Merlin)
  • Rough Oral Sex
  • Dacryphilia

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,324Chapters: 24/24Kudos: 236

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Geralt z Rivii | Geralt of Rivia/Jaskier | Dandelion

entry.title: A More Worthy King
entry.summary:
Author: remuscariad

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,260Chapters: 6/30Kudos: 427

Summary: Months before Arthur becomes crown prince, an assassination attempt is made on Uther’s life, and he is left with no choice but to ascend the throne.It changes nothing. It changes everything.ORBBC Merlin re-written. Season 1 king Arthur and onto the other seasons.
